patches.hypothesis: The method throws a NullPointerException when encountering a null element in the input array as it directly tries to call getClass() on it.
patches.changes: - Handle null elements in the array by assigning null to the corresponding index in the resulting Class array.
patches.diff: - Handle null elements in the array by assigning null to the corresponding index in the resulting Class array.

patches.hypothesis: The NullPointerException occurs because when an element in the array is null, the method calls getClass() on it, which is invalid. We need to handle null values properly.
patches.changes: - Handle null elements by checking if array[i] is null before calling getClass().
patches.diff: - Handle null elements by checking if array[i] is null before calling getClass().

patches.hypothesis: The method throws a NullPointerException when an element in the input array is null. This happens because it attempts to call getClass() on a null element.
patches.changes: - Handle null elements in the array by directly assigning null to the corresponding position in the classes array.
